Payload Format Indicator: identifier of the Payload Format Indicator

Client Identifier: Client Identifier of an existing Network Connection

Maximum Packet Size: Maximum Packet Size the Server is willing to accept

Topic Alias Maximum: highest value that the Server will accept as a Topic Alias

Reason String: UTF-8 Encoded String representing the reason

Server Keep Alive: Keep Alive time assigned by the Server

Payload Format Indicator: identifier of the Payload Format Indicator
value of the Payload Format Indicator
Payload: Payload is UTF-8 Encoded Character Data

Packet Identifier: Packet Identifier from the PUBLISH packet that is being acknowledged

Topic Filters: Topic Filters in an UNSUBSCRIBE packet

Session Expiry Interval: Session Expiry Interval in the CONNECT packet
Session Expiry Interval in the DISCONNECT packet
